repair_recommendation.suggested_action: add the required supporting component or regenerate the affected component template

preconditions: apply the recommended repair at the routed stage
rerun static_checker_v1 after the repair changes the script text
rerun mission.exe only after the regenerated script passes static verification

repaired_text:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

platform_type UAV_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 60 m/sec
      minimum_speed 20 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor gimbal WSF_EOIR_SENSOR
      frame_time 1 sec
      maximum_range 20 nm
      reports_location
      angular_resolution 1 deg
   end_sensor
end_platform_type

platform blue_uav UAV_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.70n 104.10e altitude 1000 m msl speed 50 m/sec
      position 30.70n 104.12e altitude 1000 m msl speed 50 m/sec
      position 30.70n 104.14e altitude 1000 m msl speed 50 m/sec
      position 30.70n 104.16e altitude 1000 m msl speed 50 m/sec
      position 30.70n 104.18e altitude 1000 m msl speed 50 m/sec
      position 30.70n 104.20e altitude 1000 m msl speed 50 m/sec
      position 30.70n 104.18e altitude 1000 m msl speed 50 m/sec
      position 30.70n 104.16e altitude 1000 m msl speed 50 m/sec
      position 30.70n 104.14e altitude 1000 m msl speed 50 m/sec
      position 30.70n 104.12e altitude 1000 m msl speed 50 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/heatmap_demo.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output
   file output/heatmap_demo.evt
end_event_output

csv_event_output
   file output/heatmap_demo.csv
end_csv_event_output

end_time 600 sec
